title_screen.title: STAR WANDERER
title_screen.subtitle: A SPACE ADVENTURE
title_screen.flavor: The void between stars holds both danger and opportunity. Choose your ship wisely, Captain — the galaxy awaits.

start_menu.new_game_desc: Choose a ship, difficulty and launch conditions before generating a new galaxy.
start_menu.no_save: No autosave found. Start a new expedition.
start_menu.empty_desc: There is no saved expedition in this slot yet.
start_menu.language_desc: The language changes immediately and is saved for future launches.
start_menu.animations_desc: Star twinkle, radar sweep and atmospheric effects. Disable them on slower devices or to save battery.
start_menu.sound_desc: Interface, event, travel and combat sounds.
start_menu.help_map_desc: Select an object in a sector or a sector in the galaxy. Use the wheel or pinch to zoom and drag to pan the map.
start_menu.help_turn_desc: Actions consume turns, fuel or energy. Check crew assignments and module condition before skipping a turn.
start_menu.help_crew_desc: Modules and crew can be dragged on the ship layout. Crew can move to one adjacent module once per turn.
start_menu.help_survival_desc: Protect the engine, fuel tank and life support. An expedition ends quickly without functioning critical systems.

ship.title: SHIP
ship.confirm_restart_desc: Are you sure you want to restart? All progress will be lost.

friendly_ship.quest_taken: Quest from this ship already taken.
friendly_ship.distress_request: Damaged ship requesting resources for emergency repairs.
friendly_ship.distress_helped: You have already helped this ship.
friendly_ship.default_greeting: You have encountered a friendly ship.

crew.immune_morale: 🤖 No happiness - immune to morale effects

modules.module_damaged_warning: ⚠️ Module is damaged and not working!
modules.disable_saves_energy: ⚠ Disabling module will save energy but disable its functions
modules.scanner_info_2: • Reveals true nature of distress signals

profession_descriptions.pilot: From the cockpit, reduces jump fuel use; in combat, maneuvers improve evasion.
profession_descriptions.engineer: Repairs modules; boosts reactor power and weapon accuracy or damage; in the fuel tank, synthesizes fuel or turns it into shields in combat.
profession_descriptions.medic: Heals crew and raises morale; in combat, heals a compartment and enables first aid to reduce damage.
profession_descriptions.scout: Patrols for credits; in combat, sabotages enemy systems to reduce their chance to hit.
profession_descriptions.scientist: Accelerates research in a lab, studies anomalies, and with a gunner analyzes vulnerabilities in combat to boost damage.
profession_descriptions.gunner: From the weapon bay, targets enemies, fires faster for more damage at lower accuracy, and trains.

human.name: Human
human.description: Universal race that mastered space. Learn and adapt quickly.

synthetic.name: Synthetic
synthetic.description: Artificial intelligence created by ancient civilization or humans. No emotions but flawless logic.
synthetic.special_tip: Synthetics don't consume oxygen, are immune to disease, and never lose morale — a great choice for a crew without life support or medical modules. Watch for potential AI glitches in critical moments.

xenosymbiont.name: Xenomorph-Symbiont
xenosymbiont.description: Semi-organic creatures living in symbiosis with technology. Can "merge" with ship.
xenosymbiont.special_tip: Xenomorphs can permanently merge with a ship module, granting it a lasting bonus. Open crew panel → select a xenomorph → assign task «Module Merge». Once merged, they become part of the ship and cannot be moved.

krylorian.name: Krylorian
krylorian.description: Warlike reptilian race with strong sense of honor. Excellent fighters.
krylorian.special_tip: Krylorian Intimidation reduces enemy accuracy. Multiple Krylorians in the crew stack this effect — enemies will miss significantly more often.

voidborn.name: Voidborn
voidborn.description: Creatures born in the depths of space. Don't need atmosphere or comfort.
voidborn.special_tip: Voidborn don't consume oxygen and never tire — ideal for hostile planet expeditions and long voyages. Their presence, however, unsettles organic crew members.

crystalline.name: Crystalline
crystalline.description: Sentient crystalline beings. Think slowly but possess great wisdom.
crystalline.special_tip: Crystallines boost Ancient artifact effects by 15%. If you're building around artifacts, Crystalline crew members significantly amplify their output.

no_happiness.name: No Emotions
no_happiness.description: No happiness - immune to morale effects

symbiosis.name: Techno-Symbiosis
symbiosis.description: Can merge with ship, gaining unique traits

intimidation.name: Intimidation
intimidation.description: Enemies miss more often (-2% hit chance on ship)

void_shield.name: Void Shield
void_shield.description: Ship shields regenerate 5% more per turn

rebel.name: Rebel
rebel.description: -5 morale per turn, 5% chance to flee at combat start

legend.name: Legend
legend.description: +50% max health, +15% strength of the ship's artifact effects

lucky.name: Lucky
lucky.description: +5% to credits for winning a battle

veteran.name: Veteran
veteran.description: +10% accuracy (gunner in weapon bay), -40% crew damage taken

leader.name: Leader
leader.description: +20 morale in-module, +10 in adjacent modules, +10% efficiency

pessimist.name: Pessimist
pessimist.description: -30 morale to self at combat start

storm.radiation_cloud_desc: Radiation cloud with high level of ionizing radiation.
storm.ion_storm_desc: Ion storm with powerful electromagnetic disturbances.
storm.plasma_storm_desc: Plasma storm - extremely dangerous phenomenon with high temperature.
storm.gravitational_storm_desc: Gravitational storm with extreme tidal forces.
storm.temporal_storm_desc: Temporal storm that distorts the flow of time.
storm.nanite_storm_desc: Swarm of nanites attacking ship systems.
storm.nanite_storm_damage: Disables all modules, damage to shields and modules
storm.sensors_unknown: Sensors cannot determine the type of this object.
storm.warning_enter: Entering an unknown object may be dangerous!
storm.warning_storm: Entering the storm will deal damage to ship and crew!

unknown_ship.no_scanner: Sensors cannot determine the type of this object.
unknown_ship.warning_ship: Approaching an unknown ship may be dangerous! It could be either an enemy or a friendly ship.
unknown_ship.warning_object: Approaching an unknown object may be dangerous!

contracts.research_tech: Complete any technology research on the ship

contracts.desc_gas_dive_offer: 🪸 Dive into gas planets and collect {{count}} void membranes
contracts.quest_delivery_desc: Urgent cargo delivery to another sector.
contracts.quest_delivery_cargo: 📦 Cargo will be loaded onto your ship
contracts.gas_dive_task: Dive into gas planets and collect {{count}} void membranes
contracts.expedition_survey_task: Run an expedition and reveal {{count}} any tiles on the target planet
contracts.derelict_recovery_scout: At least one scout is required

ancient_data.name: Ancient Data
ancient_data.description: Encrypted information from the Ancient civilization

alien_biology.name: Alien Biology
alien_biology.description: Samples of alien flora and fauna

quantum_crystals.name: Quantum Crystals
quantum_crystals.description: Crystals with quantum properties from anomalies

artifacts.title: ▸ ANCIENT ARTIFACTS
artifacts.tip_text: Regular artifacts can be found in anomalies and storms. Cursed artifacts are rarer, but their effects are very powerful — and dangerous.
artifacts.hint_text_archives: Archives marked this artifact as a priority for discovery
artifacts.hint_text_space_monster: A space creature pointed to this artifact
artifacts.hint_text_unknown: A lead was received for this artifact

effects.title: ▸ Active Effects
effects.description: Ship conditions from planets, crew, combat, anomalies, and events
effects.empty_hint: Assign crew, win battles, investigate anomalies, and use specialist event choices to gain effects.

coordinated_shift.name: Coordinated Shift
coordinated_shift.description: The crew has found a shared rhythm: systems respond faster and routine injuries are treated immediately.

combat_momentum.name: Combat Momentum
combat_momentum.description: A recent victory sharpened the crew's reactions and confidence in the next engagement.

anomaly_resonance.name: Anomaly Resonance
anomaly_resonance.description: Residual exotic energy stabilizes the reactor and reduces fuel losses.

anomaly_interference.name: Anomaly Interference
anomaly_interference.description: Distorted fields disrupt engine calibration and increase fuel consumption.

decisive_response.name: Decisive Response
decisive_response.description: A specialist solution left the crew prepared for the next emergency.

void_ray_pact.name: Void Ray Wake
void_ray_pact.description: Resonance with the creature smooths gravitational shifts and makes the ship more efficient.

nebula_manta_pact.name: Nebula Manta Song
nebula_manta_pact.description: Gentle pulses from the living nebula feed the reactor and speed crew recovery.

plasma_leviathan_pact.name: Plasma Wake
plasma_leviathan_pact.description: The leviathan's ion trail saturates weapon circuits and the reactor before future battles.

crystal_hydra_pact.name: Crystal Resonance
crystal_hydra_pact.description: Synchronizing with the hydra refracts enemy fire and helps the ship evade it.

help.title: 📖 LOGBOOK
help.about_text: "Star Wanderer" is a space game where you control a ship, explore the galaxy, trade, fight pirates, and discover ancient artifacts.
help.module_movement_text: You can move one module per turn. After moving, the ship frame turns yellow 🔒. Moved module is locked until end of turn.
help.pilot_desc: — Evasion in cockpit, targeting in weapon bay
help.voidborn_desc: Creatures from the depths of space
help.controls_text: Click to select, drag to move modules. Right mouse button to cancel.
help.animations_text: Sector animations (meteors and twinkling stars) can be toggled in Settings
help.victory_text: Explore the galaxy, upgrade your ship and crew. Reach the farthest corners of space to find the edge of the known galaxy. But remember — the path to the edge is open only to those who prove their readiness...
help.combat_text_1: Without gunner, accuracy -20%, target selected randomly
help.combat_text_2: Gunner in weapon bay allows target selection
help.combat_text_4: Retreat deals damage to modules and reduces crew morale
help.science_text: Open research panel (🔬 SCIENCE button at top) to research new technologies.
help.science_detail_1: Research unlocks new capabilities: module upgrades, weapons, shields
help.science_detail_3: Scientists in crew speed up research process
help.science_detail_4: Some technologies require prior research of others
help.research_tree_text: 5 technology tiers from basic to Precursor tech. Each technology may require prior research of others.
help.research_tree_detail_1: Requires a laboratory and at least one scientist in it
help.research_tree_detail_2: Only one technology researched at a time
help.research_tree_detail_4: Scientists contributing to speed capped at number of labs
help.crafting_text: At a station, open the BLUEPRINTS tab. Blueprints are available only after researching the corresponding technology.
help.crafting_plasma_desc: Pierces 25% armor, +30% damage to shields. Requires: energy samples + tech salvage
help.crafting_drones_desc: Attacks twice per shot. Requires: tech salvage + rare minerals
help.crafting_antimatter_desc: ×2.5 damage to shields. Requires: energy samples + quantum crystals + tech salvage
help.crafting_torpedo_desc: Completely ignores shields. Requires: quantum crystals + tech salvage + energy samples
help.artifacts_text: Ancient objects found in anomalies. Require a scientist to research.
help.artifacts_detail_2: Active artifacts must be activated manually
help.combat_assignments_text: During combat, each crew member can be given a combat assignment:
help.combat_assignment_heal: Healing — restores crew health in module
help.combat_assignment_firstaid: First Aid — passively reduces crew damage taken
help.combat_assignment_evasion: Evasive Maneuvers — pilot increases evasion chance
help.tip_1: Without scanner, many objects in sector are hidden
help.tip_2: 📡 Scanner with high scan range gives bonuses: signal discovery, reward detection, ambush warning
help.tip_3: Watch your fuel — can't travel without it
help.tip_4: Hiring crew at stations is cheaper than at friendly ships
help.tip_6: Black holes teleport to random sector
help.tip_7: Crew levels increase effectiveness of their abilities
help.augmentations_text: At stations with the appropriate service, you can install an augmentation on a crew member. Each person can have only one augmentation. Profession augmentations require a specific profession; racial augmentations require a specific race.
help.augmentation_optical_implant: 👁️ Optical Implant (scout) — 4 sorties per turn instead of 3
help.augmentation_overclock_core: ⚙️ Overclock Core (synthetic) — +50% to task effects, 5% AI glitch chance
help.augmentation_symbiotic_armor: 🦠 Symbiotic Armor (xenosymbiont) — 5% of damage dealt restored as HP
help.augmentation_phase_step: 👻 Phase Step (voidborn) — 50% chance to avoid damage when module is hit
help.reputation_text: Relations with races affect trade, available contracts, and behavior in space.
help.reputation_hostile: ⚔️ Hostile (-100 to -51) — attack on sight, prices ×2.0
help.reputation_unfriendly: 😠 Unfriendly (-50 to -11) — high prices, no contracts
help.reputation_allied: 🤝 Allied (51 to 100) — maximum discounts, all contracts
help.reputation_diplomacy: • Diplomacy: improve relations at Diplomatic Station for credits
help.reputation_combat: • Combat: attacking civilian ships lowers reputation (-20)
help.reputation_relations: • Race relations: helping one race may improve or worsen relations with others
help.derelict_text: Derelict ships can be found in sectors. Send a scout on a sortie — they may find spares, electronics, rare minerals, or a blueprint for a unique module.
help.derelict_detail_1: Blueprints appear in the BLUEPRINTS section on the left panel
help.derelict_detail_2: Each blueprint is one-time use (can only be crafted once)
help.derelict_detail_3: Click a blueprint to view its requirements and effects
help.expedition_help_text: Explore the surface of inhabited planets and fully scouted empty planets. Choose your crew, then reveal tiles on a 5×5 grid by spending action points (AP). Each planet can only be explored once.
help.expedition_help_ap_2: Synthetic crew members grant an additional +1 AP each
help.expedition_help_ap_3: 'Expedition Kits' unlocks expeditions on fully scouted empty planets and grants +2 AP
help.expedition_help_tiles: Tile types: 🏪 market or 📦 supply cache (credits), 🔬 lab (resources), 🏚️ ruins (event with choices), ⚠️ incident (crew damage), ✨ artifact (rare)
help.expedition_help_fatigue: After an expedition, participants rest for 5 turns — during this time they are unavailable for new expeditions
help.hybrid_modules_text: Unique 2×2 modules that combine multiple functions. Crafted at the station shipyard using found blueprints.
help.hybrid_module_bio_lab: 🧬 Bio Research Lab — lab + medical: +10 science/turn, +8 HP/turn
help.hybrid_module_pulse_drive: ⚡ Pulse Drive — reactor + engine: +5 energy, reduced fuel consumption
help.hybrid_module_medical_corps: 🏥 Medical Corps — medical + quarters: +8 HP/turn, +6 crew slots
help.hybrid_module_deep_survey: 🔭 Deep Survey Array — lab + scanner: +8 science/turn, +3 scan range
help.gas_giant_dive_1: Send a probe into the gas giant's atmosphere to collect resources
help.gas_giant_dive_2: 4 depth levels: the deeper you go, the more valuable the resources, but higher the risk
help.gas_giant_dive_3: Collect void membranes to complete contracts and research
help.gas_giant_dive_4: Random events can reward resources or damage the probe
help.gas_giant_depths: Depths: Upper Atmosphere → Cloud Belt → Abyssal Zone → Core
help.gas_giant_events: Events: bioluminescent organisms, thermal pockets, gas currents, electrical discharges
help.gas_giant_cooldown: After retrieval, the probe requires time to recharge

station.no_space: ⚠ No space for crew. Build a life support module.
station.overcrowded_warning: ⚠ Ship is overcrowded! Crew will lose morale every turn.

travel_events.title: Event en route
travel_events.no_fuel_hint: Not enough fuel for the cautious option.

asteroids.title: Asteroid stream
asteroids.description: The course runs through a dense debris cloud.
asteroids.special_hint: 1 module -15 HP, minerals to cargo (scales with drill level)

anomaly.title: Anomaly front
anomaly.description: An unstable distortion zone lies ahead.
anomaly.special_hint: all modules -10 HP, research resources (requires lab)

stress.title: Crew fatigue
stress.description: The long flight is wearing the crew down.

signal.title: Faint signal
signal.description: The receiver caught a short data burst along the route.

emp.title: Electromagnetic pulse
emp.description: The pulse front may overload defensive circuits.

trader.title: Wandering trader
trader.description: An unknown ship hails you: its captain offers to buy all your cargo without leaving course.

services.emergency_fuel_log: The station issued an emergency reserve: +{{amount}} fuel
services.repair_desc: Full restoration of all modules to 100%
services.heal_desc: Restore health to 100% and boost mood by +20
services.install_desc: Install modules from cargo hold to ship
services.no_modules: No modules in cargo hold to install.
services.install_weapon_desc: Install crafted weapons from cargo hold into weapon bays
services.remove_weapon_desc: Remove a weapon from a weapon bay and recover 50% of its value
services.aug_subtitle: Max 1 augmentation per crew member. Replacing destroys the old one.

combat.no_weapon_bay: ⚠️ No weapon bay or weapons! Cannot attack.
combat.no_gunner: ⚠️ No gunner! Accuracy -20%, target selected randomly.

distress_signal.title: ▸ DISTRESS SIGNAL
distress_signal.pirate_ambush_desc: Pirates use a false signal for a trap!
distress_signal.survivors_desc: Real survivors on board, awaiting rescue.
distress_signal.abandoned_cargo_desc: Ship is abandoned, cargo can be taken.
distress_signal.scanner_analyzed: Scanner was able to analyze the signal and determine the situation type.
distress_signal.static_message: An unidentified vessel is transmitting a distress signal. The connection is unstable — only static fills the channel.
distress_signal.scanner_failed: 📡 Scanner failed to determine signal type.
distress_signal.risk_text: You won't know the truth until you approach.
distress_signal.protocol_hint: Use the ship's systems to prepare the approach.
distress_signal.direct_approach_desc: Answer the signal without extra preparation.
distress_signal.direct_approach_ready: The outcome depends on the source
distress_signal.guarded_approach_desc: Set a defensive vector before contact in case of an ambush. If it is pirates, they will not get the first turn.
distress_signal.deep_scan_desc: The scanner and specialists try to decode the interference. Takes 1 turn.
distress_signal.deep_scan_used: Deep analysis has already been performed
distress_signal.probe_analysis_desc: A disposable probe identifies the source exactly and costs no turn.
distress_signal.medical_protocol_desc: A medic spends 1 medicine: more reputation, guaranteed samples, and an 80% chance to accept a survivor.

logs.not_signal: This is not a distress signal!
logs.already_resolved: This signal has already been handled!
logs.source_identified: The signal source is already identified.
logs.deep_scan_used: Deep scanning has already been performed for this signal.
logs.scanner_required: Deep scanning requires a working scanner.
logs.deep_scan_power: Not enough reserve power for a deep scan.
logs.deep_scan_failed: 📡 Deep scan could not decode the interference.
logs.probe_required: A research probe is required to analyze the signal.
logs.guarded_known_safe: A guarded approach is only needed against a confirmed threat.
logs.guarded_engineer: A guarded approach requires an active engineer.
logs.guarded_shields: A guarded approach requires charged shields.
logs.guarded_power: Not enough reserve power for a guarded approach.
logs.guarded_fuel: Not enough fuel for the defensive vector.
logs.medical_unavailable: Medical protocol is only available after survivors are confirmed.
logs.medical_medic: Medical protocol requires an active medic.
logs.guarded_ambush: 🛡️ The defensive vector exposed the pirate trap — pirates lose the first turn.

survivor_modal.title: Survivor Requests Asylum
survivor_modal.subtitle: Accept aboard?
survivor_modal.consequences_hint: Accepting raises crew morale and reputation with the survivor's race; declining lowers both

planet_panel.empty_planet: Empty planet. No population or quests.
planet_panel.can_scout: This planet is available for scouting
planet_panel.scouting_desc_1: Send a scout to investigate the planet.
planet_panel.explore_planet_desc: Send crew on an expedition across the planet surface.

expedition_environment.volcanic: Volcanic: −5 HP to a random crew member per step

planet_panel.expedition_abort_desc: Uncollected rewards will be lost. Crew will gain fatigue.
planet_panel.expedition_no_ap_hint: Not enough AP for another step — finish the expedition
planet_panel.expedition_scan_hint: Scan mode: tap a reachable tile to reveal its type. Costs 1 scan, not AP.
planet_panel.expedition_orbital_scan_hint: Orbital scan: tap any unrevealed tile to reveal its type. Costs no AP.
planet_panel.expedition_ruins_deeper_btn: GO DEEPER: −{{ap}} AP · rewards ×{{multiplier}} · +{{damage}} HP risk
planet_panel.expedition_ap_tooltip: Action Points (AP): each crew member provides 1 AP. AP is spent moving across the expedition map. Synthetics and scouts grant +1 bonus AP. Research can increase the total.
planet_panel.expedition_no_crew: Select at least one crew member.
planet_panel.expedition_artifact_dialog_desc: The artifact was added to your collection. Research it to reveal its effect.
planet_panel.ruins_ancient_archive_desc: Crumbling data terminals line the walls. Data can be partially recovered.
planet_panel.ruins_supply_cache_desc: A sealed container with intact supplies. What's inside?
planet_panel.ruins_collapsed_lab_desc: Research equipment is visible beneath the rubble. Dangerous, but potentially valuable.
planet_panel.ruins_memorial_site_desc: Monuments inscribed in an unknown language. Clearly important to a long-gone civilization.
planet_panel.ruins_energy_node_desc: A pulsing energy source. Unstable, but rich in samples.
planet_panel.ruins_crystal_formation_desc: Unusual crystals emitting faint light. Valuable for science.
planet_panel.ruins_old_bunker_desc: Massive doors are partially blocked. Something valuable must remain inside.
planet_panel.ruins_toxic_spill_desc: Pools of unknown substance cover the floor. Biologically active — dangerous but interesting.
planet_panel.poi_locked_hint: Complete surface scouting to reveal a point of interest
planet_panel.orbital_scan_blocked: 🌩️ Ionosphere blocks scanning — surface scouting required

legend.tier_unknown: what if there's more out there?..

black_hole.title: 🕳️ BLACK HOLE
black_hole.emergency_jump: ⚡ EMERGENCY JUMP — all modules take damage

common.cargo_full_hint: ⚠️ Cargo hold is full — some finds may not fit

planet.scout_requires_scout: Scouting requires a crew member with the Scout profession.
planet.drill_desc: Resource yield depends on planet type. One-time only.
planet.drill_requires_scientist: Requires a scientist in the crew.
planet.analysis_desc: A scientist will collect research samples. One-time only.

derelict_ship.title: Derelict Ship
derelict_ship.subtitle: A silent hulk drifting in the void
derelict_ship.description: The old ship has long been abandoned. Inside you may find spare parts, electronics, and possibly intact blueprints.
derelict_ship.hint_scout: Scout will search the wreck (1 turn)
derelict_ship.hint_loot: Possible loot: Spare Parts, Electronics, Rare Minerals
derelict_ship.hint_blueprint: 10% chance: find a hybrid module blueprint
derelict_ship.requires_scout: Requires a scout in the crew

anomaly.too_complex: ⚠ Anomaly is too complex to investigate!

approach.cautious_desc: Remote scanning. Reduced module damage, no mutation risk.
approach.standard_desc: Balanced risk and reward. Standard research procedure.
approach.deep_desc: Direct contact with the anomaly. Maximum reward, but higher damage, mutation chance, and better artifact odds.

crew_member.immune_morale: 🤖 No happiness - immune to morale effects

pilot.vent_fuel: Vent 10 fuel to restore up to 15 shields

engineer.vent_fuel: Vent 10 fuel to restore up to 15 shields

scientist.analysis: Vulnerability analysis - +10% damage if gunner is targeting

gunner.rapidfire: Rapid fire - +25% damage, -10% accuracy, random target

module_list.power_shortage_hint: Automatically disabled due to power shortage
module_list.module_damaged_warning: ⚠️ Module is damaged and not working!
module_list.disable_saves_energy: ⚠ Disabling module will save energy but disable its functions
module_list.scanner_info_2: • Reveals true nature of distress signals
module_list.xenosymbiont_no_effect: This module type does not support merging

journal.title: SHIP JOURNAL
journal.subtitle: Chronology of important run events: combat, crew, research, contracts and discoveries.
journal.empty: No entries in this category yet.

module_descriptions.habitat_module: Hybrid module: crew quarters + life support

weapon_info.accuracy_note: Can be modified by crew assignments, traits and artifacts
weapon_info.missile_feature: High damage, but 20% may be intercepted by shields
weapon_info.kinetic_usage_3: • For finishing off heavily defended enemies

station_upgrades.all_max_desc: All modules of type "{type}" already have maximum level (LV3). For further upgrade you need LV4 modules, which can be found in tier 3 sectors or obtained from bosses.
station_upgrades.need_weapon_bay: WEAPON BAY REQUIRED WITH FREE SLOT
station_upgrades.title: ▸ Station {{name}} - {{type}}

access_denied.station: Station representatives refuse to deal with you. Entry denied.
access_denied.planet: Planet inhabitants refuse to receive you. Landing denied.
access_denied.banned: This planet hasn't forgotten you. Any landing attempt will be met with force.

human_academy.name: Space Academy
human_academy.description: Human military academy offers crew training. Intensive program improves combat effectiveness.

synthetic_archives.name: Data Archives
synthetic_archives.description: Archives scan the sector and mark signals from three artifacts.

xenosymbiont_lab.name: Bio Laboratory
xenosymbiont_lab.description: Xenosymbionts are masters of biotechnology. Improve crew health and regeneration.

krylorian_dojo.name: Warrior Dojo
krylorian_dojo.description: Insectoid-krylorians are born warriors. The dojo permanently increases crew damage by 10%.

voidborn_ritual.name: Mystic Ritual
voidborn_ritual.description: The ritual grants +50% fuel efficiency and optionally enhances one active artifact.

crystalline_resonator.name: Crystal Resonator
crystalline_resonator.description: Crystalline beings can tune ship energy systems to resonate with crystals.

game_end.crew_lost_desc: All crew members died or left the ship. Without AI Core, the ship cannot function.

asteroid_belt.description: Dense cluster of asteroids with valuable resources.
asteroid_belt.engineer_required: An engineer is required to mine asteroids

star_info.shield_drain_warning: This star's radiation jams shield regeneration while you're in the system

red_dwarf.desc: The most common type of star. Stable and long-lived but dim and cold. Planets can only be habitable in the very inner zone.

yellow_dwarf.desc: A star similar to our Sun. Stable, warm, and surrounded by planets suitable for colonisation. The most welcoming type of system.

white_dwarf.desc: The remnant of a dead star, slowly cooling over millennia. Debris from old planets may still orbit it.

blue_giant.desc: A rare and massive star that burns its fuel thousands of times faster than the Sun. Its short life ends in a supernova.

red_supergiant.desc: A dying giant star in its final evolutionary stage. Instability can cause sudden flares and mass ejections.

neutron_star.desc: An ultra-dense stellar remnant left by a supernova. Spins rapidly, emitting pulses of hard radiation. Even close approach is dangerous.

double.desc: Two stars orbiting a common centre of mass. Their gravitational interplay creates complex planetary orbits.

triple.desc: Three stars in a complex gravitational dance. Unpredictable but beautiful — and rich in rare resources.

blackhole.desc: A gravitational trap from which not even light escapes. With enough courage, it can be used to jump to another system.

gas_giant.desc: A 'failed star' — too massive for a planet but too light to sustain fusion. Rich in deuterium and exotic gases.

variable_star.desc: A star whose brightness changes periodically. Pulsations create beautiful light waves but can cause navigation interference.

stellar_remnant.desc: The cold, dark remnant of a long-dead star. Quiet surroundings — only dust and debris. An ideal hiding spot.

space_monsters.title: SPACE CREATURE
space_monsters.hunt_hint: The fight targets the creature's living organs; the trophy is added to research resources.
space_monsters.resonate_hint: The probe safely reads the biosignal and grants a temporary effect. The creature remains in the sector.
space_monsters.resonance_active_hint: Resonance is already active. Return after the effect ends.
space_monsters.first_contact_used: This biosignal has already been studied. Further contacts only refresh the temporary effect.

logs.insufficient_probes: Not enough probes for a resonance contact.
logs.resonance_active: Resonance with this creature is already active.
logs.resonance: 📡 The resonance probe recorded {{name}}'s biosignal. A temporary effect was gained.
logs.first_contact_sector_scan: 🪼 The Void Ray's wake revealed every signal in the current sector.
logs.first_contact_crew_heal: 🦋 Nebula Manta dust restored {{value}} crew health.
logs.first_contact_crew_healthy: 🦋 The Nebula Manta wrapped the crew in charged dust, but no treatment was needed.
logs.first_contact_fuel_full: 🐉 The Leviathan's ion wake dissipated: the fuel tanks are already full.
logs.first_contact_artifact_hint: 💠 Crystal Hydra stored an artifact clue: {{sector}} · {{location}}.
logs.first_contact_crystal_shard: 💠 The Hydra found no new artifact trail and shed a quantum shard.

void_ray.name: Void Ray
void_ray.description: A translucent creature glides along a gravity field and studies the ship's electromagnetic wake.
void_ray.behavior: A resonance probe can map its route, while hunting cuts off its way to the rift.
void_ray.first_contact: The Ray's wake reveals every signal in the current sector once.

nebula_manta.name: Nebula Manta
nebula_manta.description: A giant bioluminescent manta gathers charged dust around the star.
nebula_manta.behavior: A resonance probe maps its charged dust, while hunting yields rare biological samples.
nebula_manta.first_contact: Charged dust restores up to {{value}} health to every living crew member.

plasma_leviathan.name: Plasma Leviathan
plasma_leviathan.description: A knot of living plasma crosses stellar flares and leaves a burning trail behind it.
plasma_leviathan.behavior: It reacts dangerously to weapon targeting, but a probe can safely record its plasma wake.
plasma_leviathan.first_contact: Its ion wake refills fuel tanks by {{value}}% of their capacity.

crystal_hydra.name: Crystal Hydra
crystal_hydra.description: Several crystalline heads read the ship's signals in unison and reflect the surrounding light.
crystal_hydra.behavior: A probe records its crystalline pattern; destroying it leaves valuable quantum crystals.
crystal_hydra.first_contact: Its crystalline pattern stores an exact clue to one undiscovered artifact.

planet_descriptions.desert: Arid world with extreme temperature swings. Rich in minerals but requires water imports.
planet_descriptions.ice: Frozen world with subsurface oceans. Prospective for deuterium and rare gas mining.
planet_descriptions.forest: Planet with rich biosphere and moderate climate. Ideal for colonization and agriculture.
planet_descriptions.volcanic: Geologically active world with constant eruptions. Rich in sulfur and rare metals.
planet_descriptions.oceanic: Water world with archipelagos. Prospective for fishing and marine resource extraction.
planet_descriptions.crystalline: World with giant crystal formations and resonant caverns. Rich in quantum crystals and rare minerals.
planet_descriptions.radioactive: World with high radiation levels after catastrophe or bombardment. Requires protective suits.
planet_descriptions.tropical: Humid planet with dense jungles. Rich in bio-resources but dangerous due to diseases.
planet_descriptions.arctic: Cold world with ice wastelands. Prospective for ice and cryogenic mineral mining.
planet_descriptions.war_torn: Planet devastated by ancient conflicts. Full of ruins, artifacts, and dangerous zones.
planet_descriptions.ringed: Planet with prominent ring system. Rings are rich in minerals and ice.
planet_descriptions.tidal: World with powerful tidal activity. Geothermal energy available but surface is unstable.

human_academy.name: Space Academy
human_academy.description: Human military academy offers crew training. Intensive program enhances combat effectiveness.

synthetic_archives.name: Data Archives
synthetic_archives.description: Archives scan the sector and mark signals from three artifacts.

xenosymbiont_lab.name: Bio-Laboratory
xenosymbiont_lab.description: Krylorians are masters of biotechnology. Improve crew health and regeneration.

krylorian_dojo.name: Warrior Dojo
krylorian_dojo.description: Insectoid-krylorians are born warriors. The dojo permanently increases crew damage by 10%.

voidborn_ritual.name: Mystic Ritual
voidborn_ritual.description: The ritual grants +50% fuel efficiency and optionally enhances one active artifact.
voidborn_ritual.voidborn_artifact_selection: Choose an active artifact to enhance (optional; without one, only the fuel bonus applies):

crystalline_resonator.name: Crystal Resonator
crystalline_resonator.description: Crystalline beings can tune ship energy systems to resonate with crystals.

reinforced_hull.name: Alloy Metallurgy
reinforced_hull.description: Next-generation exotic alloys increase durability of all modules by 10%.

efficient_reactor.name: Fusion Engineering
efficient_reactor.description: Improved fusion chambers increase reactor power output by 15%.

targeting_matrix.name: Ballistic Computing
targeting_matrix.description: Advanced targeting algorithms improve weapon accuracy and damage by 10%.

scanner_mk2.name: Remote Sensing
scanner_mk2.description: Next-gen sensor technology extends scan range by +1 sector.

automated_repair.name: Nanorobotics
automated_repair.description: A nanite swarm continuously repairs damage — restoring 2% module health per turn.

medbay_upgrade.name: Exobiology
medbay_upgrade.description: Study of alien organisms improves medical protocols, increasing crew health by 15%.

xenobiology.name: Xenobiology
xenobiology.description: Study of alien biology enables treating crew mutations at medical stations.

ion_drive.name: Ion Propulsion
ion_drive.description: Ion engines reduce fuel consumption by 30% and improve power efficiency by 10%.

shield_booster.name: Electromagnetic Fields
shield_booster.description: Mastery of new electromagnetic field types increases shield power by 25%.

combat_drones.name: Autonomous Systems
combat_drones.description: Autonomous combat drones attack targets without crew input, providing +15% damage.

plasma_weapons.name: Plasma Physics
plasma_weapons.description: Weaponized plasma discharges unlock new armaments and provide +15% damage.

lab_network.name: Network Science
lab_network.description: Networking all laboratories accelerates data sharing and all research by 25%.

quantum_scanner.name: Quantum Optics
quantum_scanner.description: Quantum-entangled sensors scan space, extending detection range by +2 sectors.

cargo_expansion.name: Modular Architecture
cargo_expansion.description: Compact cargo bay design principles increase cargo capacity by 30%.

crew_training.name: Cognitive Technology
crew_training.description: Neural programs and simulators accelerate crew learning, providing +25% experience gain.

singularity_reactor.name: Gravitational Compression
singularity_reactor.description: Harnessing a micro-singularity provides an inexhaustible energy source: +30% power to all systems.

phase_shield.name: Phase Engineering
phase_shield.description: Phase shields deflect attacks into another dimension: 20% chance to fully absorb a hit.

quantum_torpedo.name: Quantum Entanglement
quantum_torpedo.description: Entangled warheads teleport through enemy shields, dealing +30% damage.

antimatter_weapons.name: Antimatter Physics
antimatter_weapons.description: Matter-antimatter annihilation deals double damage to shields and +25% overall damage.

deep_scan.name: Neutrino Tomography
deep_scan.description: Neutrino detectors see through matter, extending scan range by +3 sectors.

nanite_hull.name: Molecular Assembly
nanite_hull.description: Molecular machines in the hull continuously regenerate 5% of all module health per turn.

neural_interface.name: Neurocybernetics
neural_interface.description: Direct brain-ship interface accelerates reaction: +30% crew exp and research speed.

genetic_enhancement.name: Genetic Engineering
genetic_enhancement.description: Targeted DNA modification strengthens crew biology: +30% health and +15% experience.

void_resonance.name: Void Resonance
void_resonance.description: Void-space harmonics amplify shields by 30% and increase all weapon damage by 15%.

ancient_power.name: Theory of the Ancients
ancient_power.description: Full decipherment of Ancient technology reveals principles granting +50% to all ship parameters.

stellar_genetics.name: Stellar Genetics
stellar_genetics.description: Studying the DNA of stellar entities unlocks evolutionary paths: +50% health, +40% crew exp, +20% research speed.

warp_drive.name: Warp Metrics
warp_drive.description: Mastery of spacetime metrics enables sector jumps without any fuel consumption.

artifact_study.name: Relic Science
artifact_study.description: Basic protocols for working with Ancient relics allow activating one additional artifact.

relic_chamber.name: Relic Chamber
relic_chamber.description: Specialized storage enhances interaction with artifacts: +1 slot and +5% to their effects.

ancient_resonance.name: Ancient Resonance
ancient_resonance.description: Tuning ship systems to relic frequencies: +1 slot and +10% to artifact effects.

artifact_mastery.name: Relic Mastery
artifact_mastery.description: Complete unity with the Ancient heritage: +2 active artifact slots and +15% to all their effects.

planetary_drill.name: Planetary Drill
planetary_drill.description: Adapts the drill module for planetary surface operations. Resource yield depends on planet type: ice worlds yield water, volcanic worlds yield energy, jungles yield biomatter, and so on.

atmospheric_analysis.name: Atmospheric Analysis
atmospheric_analysis.description: A scientist can collect atmospheric samples from any empty planet once. Planet type determines which research resources are gathered.

expedition_kits.name: Expedition Kits
expedition_kits.description: Unlocks expeditions on fully scouted empty planets. Keeps the +2 action point bonus for every ground expedition.

storm_shields.name: Storm Shields
storm_shields.description: Specialized shielding fields reduce damage from all storm types by 50%.

modular_arsenal.name: Modular Arsenal
modular_arsenal.description: Redesigned weapon bay architecture allows one additional weapon per bay. Double bays hold 3 weapons instead of 2.

ion_cannon.name: Ion Cannon
ion_cannon.description: Develops an ion weapon that deals massive shield damage (×4) but cannot damage the hull. Essential for stripping shields before a finishing volley.

gas_giant.description: A gas planet whose atmosphere teems with bioluminescent organisms. Send a probe into the depths — the deeper you go, the richer the harvest, but the more dangerous the conditions.
gas_giant.event_bioluminescent_swarm_desc: Billions of glowing microorganisms surround the probe, creating a shimmering cloud. They are not aggressive — for now.
gas_giant.event_thermal_pocket_desc: The probe enters an upwelling of superheated gas. Temperature rises rapidly — the concentration of energy particles inside the pocket is off the charts.
gas_giant.event_gas_currents_desc: Powerful atmospheric gas streams carry the probe along. With the right approach, you can collect valuable samples along the way.
gas_giant.event_creature_swarm_desc: Large atmospheric creatures circle the probe. They are curious but can be dangerous if approached.
gas_giant.event_organic_web_desc: The probe has encountered a dense web of biological filaments. These structures may contain rare compounds, but getting entangled is dangerous.
gas_giant.event_electrical_storm_desc: A local storm cell generates powerful discharges. The energy potential is enormous — if you dare to harvest it.
gas_giant.event_giant_organism_desc: A creature the size of a small ship drifts slowly through the clouds. Such a biological sample would be an incredibly rare scientific find.
gas_giant.event_pressure_vortex_desc: A gravitational vortex compresses atmospheric gases to a solid state. Inside — a concentration of mineral compounds of incredible density.
gas_giant.event_dead_zone_desc: A region of anomalous silence: no creatures, no movement. The walls of the zone are covered in organic membranes — the remnants of a vanished colony.
gas_giant.event_storm_heart_desc: The probe has reached the planet's metallic core. Hydrogen is compressed to a metallic state — extreme conditions give rise to unique biological forms. Membrane organisms coat every surface. Pressure is beyond limits.
gas_giant.event_primordial_matter_desc: At the very center of the giant lies a region of primordial matter, where pressure transforms gases into exotic liquid. Physics operates by different laws here.
gas_giant.event_living_lightning_desc: The discharges here are not mere electricity. They move with purpose, change shape, react to the probe. This is a creature made of pure energy.
gas_giant.no_probes: No probes — buy at a station
gas_giant.probe_lost_description: Pressure and the storm destroyed the probe. Collected resources were lost.

wreck_field.radiation_notice: Radiation: a standard pass costs {{damage}} shields; surface salvage costs about half, deep salvage costs one and a half times more.
wreck_field.scanner_bonus: 📡 Scanner (range {{range}}): +{{bonus}}% chance for valuable finds during deep breach.
wreck_field.lab_bonus: 🔬 Laboratory: Ancient Data is doubled when found.

surface.name: Surface salvage
surface.description: Less loot and radiation; the crew is protected.

standard.name: Standard salvage
standard.description: The usual balance of rewards and risk.

deep.name: Deep breach
deep.description: More loot and better odds for rare finds; more radiation.

blueprints.title: BLUEPRINTS
blueprints.no_blueprints_modules: — Modules: scout finds them on derelict ships

crafting.title: Weapon Crafting
crafting.no_recipes_modules_hint: Scout finds module blueprints on derelict ships.
crafting.no_weapon_recipes: Research technologies to unlock weapon blueprints
crafting.no_module_recipes: Scout finds module blueprints on derelict ships

tutorial.title: WELCOME, CAPTAIN
tutorial.step1_desc: The left panel is your ship control. Ship holds the layout, stats, modules and cargo; beside it are crew, contracts, progress, blueprints and the log.
tutorial.step1_highlight: Open Ship → Stats to check combat readiness
tutorial.step2_desc: The right panel shows the game world. Click SECTOR MAP to see all available locations. Click any object — your ship will fly there.
tutorial.step2_highlight: Mouse wheel to zoom, click and drag to pan the map
tutorial.step_nav_desc: First select a sector on the galaxy map, then a location inside it. Travel between distant sectors takes multiple turns.
tutorial.step_nav_highlight: Click a sector → sector map opens → choose a planet or station
tutorial.step3_desc: Find and visit a station (🏪 on the map). Buy ship modules, hire crew, repair hull damage and take on contracts for rewards.
tutorial.step3_highlight: Without a reactor and engine your ship won't fly — check their condition!
tutorial.step4_desc: Hire specialists: Pilot improves evasion, Engineer repairs per turn, Medic heals crew, Scout explores planets, Scientist boosts research output.
tutorial.step5_desc: Explore available systems, take contracts, and develop your ship. New objectives will appear as you progress.
tutorial.step5_highlight: Open Progress to see the current objective and its next step

hints.station: At a station you can hire crew, buy modules, repair your ship, and sell/buy cargo.
hints.combat: Place a Gunner in a weapon bay (weaponbay) — it boosts accuracy and damage for all onboard weapons.
hints.research: Build a lab and assign a Scientist to it to start researching technologies.
hints.contracts: Contracts give credits, reputation with a race, and crew experience — take ones your ship can handle.
hints.low_happiness: A crew member's happiness is low. At 0 happiness for 3 turns straight they desert — assign a Morale task or let them rest.
hints.xenosymbiont_merge: A xenosymbiont is aboard! Assign it the "🧬 Merge" task in a module — it grants a permanent bonus depending on the module type.
hints.first_mutation: A crew member has mutated — a permanent random trait (can be helpful or harmful). See details in the crew card's Profile tab.

sector_map_ui.hint: Click a location to fly there. Click and drag to pan. Mouse wheel to zoom.
sector_map_ui.unknown_markers_hint_line_1: Unknown ships and objects appear when scanner coverage is insufficient
sector_map_ui.unknown_markers_hint_line_2: and may conceal other locations until you get closer or detect them with the scanner.

galaxy_map_ui.hint: Select a sector to jump to. Mouse wheel to zoom. Click and drag to pan.

danger.title: Low combat readiness
danger.description: Sector “{{sector}}”: readiness score {{rating}}, recommended {{recommended}}. Travel is possible, but enemies in this tier may be too strong.
danger.readiness_hint: Readiness is a combat estimate based on working modules, weapons, and living crew. The recommended value is not an engine level or a travel lock.

reach_tier4.title: The Far Frontier
reach_tier4.description: Find a route beyond the known star charts.
reach_tier4.completion: The quantum drive carried the ship to the edge of known space.

defeat_void_oracle.title: Oracle of the Void
defeat_void_oracle.description: Find and destroy the Oracle of the Void.
defeat_void_oracle.completion: The Oracle of the Void was destroyed and its network fell silent.

defeat_3_bosses.title: Hunt the Ancients
defeat_3_bosses.description: Destroy three ancient bosses anywhere in the galaxy.
defeat_3_bosses.completion: Three ancient machines were destroyed. The others can no longer act with impunity.

scientific_ascension.title: Scientific Ascension
scientific_ascension.description: Decode Ancient technologies and study the artifacts you discover.
scientific_ascension.completion: The crew united Ancient technology and artifacts into a new scientific paradigm.

galactic_coalition.title: Galactic Coalition
galactic_coalition.description: Unite the races through contracts, trust and a shared economy.
galactic_coalition.completion: The allied worlds recognized the ship as the center of a new galactic coalition.

campaign_directive.label: OPERATION

explore.title: Reconnaissance
explore.description: Explore available systems, complete contracts, and strengthen your ship.

campaign_directive.reach_tier4: Look for a route beyond the known sectors.
campaign_directive.defeat_void_oracle: Find and destroy the Oracle of the Void.

campaign_progress.summary: Campaign overview: which routes are open, which systems are charted, and where to explore next.

save_load.title: SAVES
save_load.hint: Auto-save is created every turn. On page refresh the latest auto-save is loaded.

new_game_setup.title: New Game
new_game_setup.subtitle: Choose a ship template, starting doctrine, and launch modifiers
new_game_setup.modifiers_beginner_tip: Choose one doctrine and any number of regular modifiers

explorer.name: Explorer
explorer.description: A balanced standard ship. Cargo bay, engineer, and scout in the crew. Ideal for a first run.

fighter.name: Fighter
fighter.description: Upgraded reactor and weapon bay. Krylorian crew. High damage, but no medical or science.

trader.name: Trader
trader.description: Two cargo bays and large capital for trading. Survives on credits, not firepower.

scientist.name: Scientist
scientist.description: Lab, scanner, and starting research resources. Slow start, but strong late game.

engineer.name: Engineer
engineer.description: Repair bay and powerful reactor. Synthetic engineer never tires. Ship repairs itself every turn.

weapon_showcase.name: Weapon Range (DEV)
weapon_showcase.description: A 7×7 visual test grid with every rendered module and weapon bays holding 1, 3, 4, and 5 weapons. Available only in development.

doctrine_explorer.name: Deep-Space Explorer
doctrine_explorer.description: More fuel and starting data for pushing beyond the map, but fewer credits for repairs and trade.

doctrine_boss_hunter.name: Ancient Hunter
doctrine_boss_hunter.description: Crew starts more experienced and better prepared for dangerous fights, but the campaign begins with costly preparation and less fuel.

doctrine_trader.name: Free Trader
doctrine_trader.description: Strong starting capital for markets and upgrades, but reduced fuel makes route planning tighter.

doctrine_exile.name: Exile
doctrine_exile.description: Extra credits for a risky start: the ship is damaged and Krylorians already distrust you.

veteran_crew.name: Veteran Crew
veteran_crew.description: All crew starts at level 3 with high stats.

extra_fuel.name: Extra Tanks
extra_fuel.description: +50 to max fuel capacity and starting fuel.

random_starting_tech.name: Random Breakthrough
random_starting_tech.description: Game begins with one random starting technology already researched.

solo_mission.name: Solo Mission
solo_mission.description: Start with only the pilot. No support, but extra credits.

weakened_reactor.name: Weakened Reactor
weakened_reactor.description: Reactor generates 2 less energy, leaving less reserve for upgrades and power-hungry systems.

crisis_start.name: Emergency Start
crisis_start.description: Game begins with a random galactic crisis already active. Very dangerous, but the starting budget is much higher.

cursed_relic.name: Cursed Relic
cursed_relic.description: Game starts with a random cursed artifact activated. High risk, high reward.

stranded.name: Stranded
stranded.description: Start with a nearly empty standard tank: 20 fuel. The engine or fuel tank is damaged by 35%, but you salvage a bit of tech from the wreck.

damaged_ship.name: Damaged Ship
damaged_ship.description: All ship modules are damaged by 40% at the start. Urgent repairs needed.

wanted.name: Wanted
wanted.description: Krylorians are known from turn one and already hostile (-70 reputation). Extra credits compensate the risk.

salvaged_parts.name: Salvaged Parts
salvaged_parts.description: Ship cobbled together from scraps: modules damaged 20%, but +10 tech salvage in the hold for research.

storm.title: Cosmic Storm
storm.description: An energy front threatens the {{module}} system. Expected load: {{damage}} HP.

pilot.label: Evade the front
pilot.description: The pilot plots a course through a break in the storm.
pilot.outcome: The module takes only {{damage}} damage and the pilot gains experience.
pilot.requirement: a living pilot stationed in an active cockpit

shields.label: Route shields
shields.description: Redirect the defensive field toward the impact side.

standard.label: Brace compartments
standard.description: Prepare the ship to take the storm head-on.

capsule.title: Drifting Capsule
capsule.description: Scanners detect a sealed capsule. A trade beacon values its coordinates at {{reward}}₢.

science.label: Decode the archive
science.description: A scientist studies the capsule's memory instead of selling it.

salvage.label: Dismantle capsule
salvage.description: An engineer safely extracts equipment inside the cargo hold.
salvage.requirement: a living engineer and active cargo hold

standard.label: Sell coordinates
standard.description: Transmit the data to a trade beacon without bringing the capsule aboard.

virus.title: Shipboard Virus
virus.description: An unknown pathogen entered the ventilation system. Without intervention, all crew morale drops by {{penalty}}.

medic.label: Field treatment
medic.description: A medic contains the symptoms and runs emergency prophylaxis.
medic.outcome: Crew morale drops by only 2 and the medic gains experience.

purge.label: Digital purge
purge.description: An AI or synthetic absorbs the infected data and destroys it.
purge.outcome: Morale is preserved; the AI module or synthetic loses 5 HP.
purge.requirement: an active AI core or living synthetic

standard.label: Full quarantine
standard.description: Seal the decks and wait for the outbreak to pass.

fuel_leak.title: Fuel Leak
fuel_leak.description: Sensors detect a ruptured fuel line. Estimated loss before isolation: {{loss}} fuel.

engineer.label: Manual seal
engineer.description: An engineer reaches the damaged junction and seals it in place.
engineer.outcome: Only {{loss}} fuel is lost and the engineer gains experience.

drones.label: Send repair drones
drones.description: The repair bay seals the line before any fuel is lost.
drones.outcome: Fuel is preserved; the repair bay loses 5 HP.

standard.label: Isolate the line
standard.description: Use standard automation to shut down the damaged section.

crew_dispute.title: Crew Dispute
crew_dispute.description: Mounting tension has erupted into an open dispute between shifts. Without intervention, morale drops by {{penalty}}.

captain.label: Intervene personally
captain.description: The captain hears both sides and makes a decision.
captain.outcome: Morale drops by only 2 and the pilot-captain gains experience.

quarters.label: Separate the shifts
quarters.description: Send the conflicting shifts to rest in the living quarters.
quarters.outcome: The crew settles down without losing morale.

standard.label: Restore order
standard.description: End the dispute by command and send everyone back to duty.

biohazard.title: Biohazard
biohazard.description: Scanners detect alien spores in the ventilation system. Without intervention, the crew takes {{damage}} HP damage.

medic.label: Emergency decontamination
medic.description: The medic develops an antidote and contains the contamination.
medic.outcome: Crew damage reduced to {{damage}} HP, medic gains experience.

filters.label: Bio-filters
filters.description: Life support switches to deep filtration mode.
filters.outcome: Spores neutralized, life support takes 5 HP damage.

standard.label: General isolation
standard.description: Seal the compartments and wait out the spore spread.
standard.outcome: Crew takes {{damage}} HP damage and loses 5 morale.

meteor_shower.title: Meteor Shower
meteor_shower.description: A stream of rocks bears down on the ship. System «{{module}}» at risk: {{damage}} HP damage.

engineer.label: Evasive maneuver
engineer.description: The engineer reroutes engine power for emergency evasion.
engineer.outcome: Only {{damage}} HP damage, engineer gains experience.

shields.label: Max shields
shields.outcome: Shields absorb {{absorbed}}, remaining module damage: {{damage}} HP.

pirate_raid.title: Pirate Raid
pirate_raid.description: Corsairs demand a {{loss}}₢ ransom. Without resistance they'll take everything.

gunner.label: Counterattack
gunner.description: The gunner returns fire and scatters the pirates.
gunner.outcome: Pirates drop their loot: +{{loot}}₢, gunner gains experience.

weapons.label: Show of force
weapons.description: Power up weapon systems and intimidate the corsairs.

standard.label: Pay the ransom
standard.description: Transfer credits to avoid the worst.

distress_signal.title: Distress Signal
distress_signal.description: A heavily damaged ship begs for help. Its crew is dying.

medic.label: Medical rescue
medic.description: The medic provides emergency aid to the wounded.

medical.label: Take aboard wounded
medical.description: The medical bay takes in the wounded for treatment.
medical.outcome: Crew morale +3 for doing the right thing.

trader.title: Wandering Trader
trader.description: A roving merchant offers a deal with a {{discount}}₢ discount.

scientist.label: Appraise goods
scientist.description: The scientist checks the goods for hidden value.
scientist.outcome: Ancient Data found: +1, scientist gains experience.

cargo.label: Stock up
cargo.description: The cargo bay takes in a shipment at a discount.

derelict.title: Derelict Ship
derelict.description: A drifting ship with no crew. Estimated value: {{reward}}₢.

scientist.label: Full analysis
scientist.description: The scientist studies the ship from stern to bridge.
scientist.outcome: +1 Ancient Data, +1 Tech Salvage, scientist gains experience.

scanner.label: Deep scan
scanner.description: Scanners probe the ship for valuable components.

standard.label: Quick look
standard.description: Grab easy salvage from the outside.

ancient_signal.title: Ancient Signal
ancient_signal.description: Receivers pick up an encrypted signal of unknown origin.

scientist.label: Full decryption
scientist.description: The scientist decodes the entire signal in the lab.
scientist.outcome: +2 Ancient Data, +1 Tech Salvage, scientist gains experience.
scientist.requirement: living scientist in an active lab

scanner.label: Partial intercept
scanner.description: The scanner captures fragments of the signal.

standard.label: Ignore
standard.outcome: The signal fades on its own.

research_breakthrough.title: Research Breakthrough
research_breakthrough.description: Lab instruments detected a pattern in the sector data.

scientist.label: Develop the hypothesis
scientist.description: A scientist in the lab will confirm the discovery.
scientist.outcome: +2 Ancient Data, +2 Tech Salvage, scientist gains experience.
scientist.requirement: living scientist in an active lab

standard.label: Log the finding
standard.description: Save the observation without committing resources.
standard.outcome: The discovery remains in the log.

artifact_resonance.title: Artifact Resonance
artifact_resonance.description: A discovered artifact has started responding to the ship's fields.

scientist.label: Tune the resonance
scientist.description: A scientist guides the artifact's response.
scientist.outcome: +2 Ancient Data, crew morale +5, scientist gains experience.

lab.label: Laboratory analysis
lab.description: The lab isolates useful signal fragments.

standard.label: Observe
standard.description: Let the resonance fade without intervention.

consequence.title: Delayed Consequence
consequence.description: A consequence of the decision during “{{event}}” has surfaced.
consequence.outcome: The result will be applied to the ship state after confirmation.

storm.specialist: The successful maneuver strengthened crew confidence: up to +3 morale.

crisis_panel.title: Crisis Center
crisis_panel.subtitle: Threat monitoring without schedule forecasts. Crises are treated as unexpected events.

incident.name: Outbreak
incident.description: The threat is already active. This is the best window for an organized response.

escalation.name: Escalation
escalation.description: Consequences intensify; delaying action rapidly becomes more expensive.

critical.name: Critical
critical.description: The ship is losing stability. The crisis's core systems take heavy damage.

catastrophic.name: Catastrophic
catastrophic.description: Containment is at its limit: without intervention, damage will be maximal.

crisis_panel.no_active: There is no active crisis. The center shows ship readiness and response protocols without revealing future events.

hull.label: Hull
hull.hint: repairs reduce the risk of cascading failures

crew.label: Crew
crew.hint: health and morale help keep a crisis under control

fuel.label: Fuel
fuel.hint: reserves are needed for evacuation and emergency maneuvers

crisis_panel.threat_database_description: An archive of crises already encountered by the crew.
crisis_panel.threat_database_empty: No data yet. The first encountered crisis will be added automatically.

combat.label: Combat
combat.requirement: weapon bay and an active gunner
combat.cost: 250₢, 18 fuel, -30 HP to every weapon bay

science.label: Science
science.requirement: laboratory, scanner, and an active scientist
science.cost: 12 Tech Salvage, 8 Ancient Data, 4 Energy Samples

diplomacy.label: Diplomacy
diplomacy.requirement: 3 known races and 35+ reputation with at least one
diplomacy.cost: 800₢ and -12 reputation with your strongest ally

raider_wave.combat: Intercept the raider groups and stop their attacks by force.
raider_wave.diplomacy: Bribe intermediaries and cut off the raiders' supply lines.
raider_wave.resources: Fund escort convoys, false beacons, and emergency cargo rerouting.

solar_flare.science: Recalculate protection circuits and stabilize the electronics.
solar_flare.resources: Burn fuel and spare parts on emergency shielding.

epidemic.science: Deploy quarantine protocols and develop treatment from samples.
epidemic.diplomacy: Request medical aid and vaccines from known races.
epidemic.resources: Spend reserves on compartment isolation, medicine, and ration changes.

fuel_shortage.science: Retune the engines and reduce losses in the fuel system.
fuel_shortage.diplomacy: Secure emergency supplies through known factions.
fuel_shortage.resources: Buy an expensive emergency reserve and distribute it across ship systems.

raider_wave.name: Raider Wave
raider_wave.description: Raiders become unusually active in the region and start pressuring your ship's supplies.
raider_wave.effects: At the start they may steal cargo and damage modules. Then each turn brings raids that cost credits or fuel, damage a random system, and reduce crew morale. With every stage, raiders take a larger share of funds and hit harder.

solar_flare.name: Solar Flare
solar_flare.description: A powerful stellar flare overloads sensitive electronics and strips away shield stability.
solar_flare.effects: Sensitive modules are disabled at the start and shields are dropped to zero. While the crisis lasts, those systems take accelerating damage. They come back online when it ends, but the repair bill remains yours.

epidemic.name: Epidemic
epidemic.description: Disease spreads aboard the ship: some crew become infected and the rest begin to panic.
epidemic.effects: Specific organic crew members become infected. They lose health and morale each turn, while the rest of the crew also suffers morale loss. At critical stages the infection breaches quarantine and infects new crew. A medic significantly reduces the severity.

fuel_shortage.name: Fuel Crisis
fuel_shortage.description: Fuel reserves become unreliable and parts of the propulsion chain must be throttled.
fuel_shortage.effects: You immediately lose some fuel and engine or fuel systems may be temporarily limited. Then each turn drains fuel, wears down those systems, and hurts morale. Consumption and wear accelerate sharply in later stages.

rich_deposits.name: Rich deposits
rich_deposits.desc: Drilling yields twice as much, an extra pass is available

aggressive_fauna.name: Aggressive fauna
aggressive_fauna.desc: Higher infection risk while scouting, but finds are 50% richer

dense_ionosphere.name: Dense ionosphere
dense_ionosphere.desc: Orbital scanning is impossible; atmospheric analysis yields more resources

ancient_traces.name: Ancient traces
ancient_traces.desc: Double chance to find research samples while scouting

derelict_lander.title: Derelict lander
derelict_lander.desc: The scout stumbled upon a half-buried lander of unknown design. The hatch is jammed, but the hull is still intact.

ancient_beacon.title: Ancient beacon
ancient_beacon.desc: An obelisk with dimly flickering patterns juts out of the bedrock. It is still emitting a faint signal.

hidden_cache.title: Smugglers' cache
hidden_cache.desc: Beneath a layer of soil the scout found a sealed container with a code lock and traces of a recent visit.
